text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Just as I'm walking by the dance<n>studio...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three! Right hand and then...<n>left hand?
After that is... um...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Cross my... legs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Holy smokes! That was quite the<n>tumble!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You saw that, Teio?! This is so<n>embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I saw everything! You're practicing<n>dancing for
your winning concerts,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! If it's dancing you need help<n>with, look no
further than the<n>invincible dance master!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You'll help me?! Oh, thank you,<n>Tei—Master Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me, Spe! Now watch<n>closely. This is my
legendary Teio<n>Step!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And that's it! Pretty simple, right? The<n>part you're
having trouble with can<n>be solved by...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoop, doop, alley-oop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoop, doop, alley-oop? I see! I'll try<n>that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoop! Doop! Alley... oop!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, wait. Something's not right.<n>It's less of a
whoop and more of a<n>shwoop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Shwoop! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry. It's just your teaching<n>is kinda
funny!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh, really?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, genius can manifest in peculiar<n>ways!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though the peculiar way of teaching<n>makes
Special Week laugh, she takes<n>the lesson
seriously.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is fun, but I still don'tthink I have the hang of it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not great at running either. No<n>matter how
far I go, it's never<n>enough.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I have a long way to go before I<n>become the top
racer in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Even though this is all a lot of fun, I...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'm just wasting time.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey! Spe! Don't you know<n>why we
even have winning<n>concerts?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Actually, I really don't. Is it so<n>we have a
reason to get first place?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh! Well, I know! Prez gave me a<n>hint!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: The reason is...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, Teio. One should find the<n>answer by
themself.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Special Week. Finding your own<n>reason is what's
important.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Look within yourself and question<n>why you
perform.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: President! Okay, I will!
